text: Micron stock jumps 9% as soaring prices from memory crunch lead to quadrupling of revenue - CNBC
fullText: Micron's quarterly earnings report follows a 700% surge in the memory maker's stock price over the past year.

text: Federal Reserve says U.S. banks can withstand $708 billion in losses amid overhaul of capital rules - CNBC
fullText: The Fed's annual exercise comes at a pivotal moment for bank regulation because, unlike previous years, the results will not affect capital requirements.

text: Trump has testy meeting with GOP senators, telling Cassidy at one point to sit down - CBS News
fullText: President Trump met with Republican senators soon after canceling plans to sign bipartisan housing affordability legislation at the Capitol.

text: Extreme heat is melting national records across Europe, with more coming Thursday - CNN
fullText: Punishing temperatures are scorching Europe as it swelters under a fierce heat dome, bringing dangerous conditions to swaths of the fastest-warming continent. Follow for live updates.

text: New clues emerge about Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's wedding location - USA Today
fullText: Clues about the Taylor Swift-Travis Kelce wedding are dropping fast as permits are filed in New York City.

text: Camp Mystic files for Chapter 11 bankruptcy, pausing flood lawsuits - Austin American-Statesman
fullText: The filing automatically halts pending lawsuits while the Chapter 11 case moves forward. The camp estimated debt exceeding $10 million.

text: GTA VI is a worrying sign for the future of physical games - The Verge
fullText: Rockstar says that physical versions of GTA VI won’t include a disc, and instead will only contain a download code inside the box.

text: France reports first Ebola patient as cases in Africa surge above 1,000 - The Washington Post
fullText: France said a doctor back from a humanitarian mission was infected and in stable condition, while experts said the outbreak in Africa could be the worst ever recorded.

text: The 23 best Amazon Prime Day laptop deals, from someone who’s tested them for 13 years - CNN
fullText: Prime Day is officially here, and our computing expert found some great deals on laptops and computers you can get right now.

text: Exclusive | CDC Ends Hantavirus Response as U.S. Outbreak Risk Diminishes - WSJ
Trump cancels plan to sign major housing bill as he fights with Congress over the SAVE Act - NBC News
fullText: President Donald Trump abruptly canceled his plans to sign a major, bipartisan housing bill on Wednesday, saying he will not do so until Congress passes the SAVE America Act, a sweeping elections bill that has become a focal point of his second term.

text: Chief of staff to former NYC Mayor Eric Adams, 3 others charged in federal bribery probe - AP News
fullText: A former chief of staff to New York ex-Mayor Eric Adams has been arrested in a bribery case. It's the latest sign that federal prosecutors continue to scrutinize Adams’ inner circle months after the scandal-bruised Democrat left office. Frank Carone pleaded n…

text: Ukraine’s latest long-range strikes on Russia hit a major natural gas plant and satellite centers - AP News
fullText: Ukrainian forces have struck a major natural gas processing plant and two key satellite communications centers in Russia. Ukraine’s General Staff reported Wednesday that an attack targeted the Orenburg Gas Processing Plant, setting it on fire. The plant, loca…

text: Remarkable photos show ancient human burials uncovered in Egypt, with clues to centuries of changing tradition - CBS News
fullText: Human and animal remains unearthed in Egypt's Nile Delta reveal changing funerary practices over some 600 years, and the evolution of a key site itself.

text: Trump accuses oil companies of gas price ‘gouging,’ calls for DOJ probe - NBC News
fullText: President Donald Trump said Wednesday that he had instructed the Justice Department to immediately probe oil companies for not lowering gas prices at the pump in line with falling costs, accusing them of “gouging” consumers.

text: ‘Blatant discrimination’: WNBA’s decision to punish Caitlin Clark sparks outrage - Yahoo Sports
fullText: Indiana Fever point guard Caitlin Clark will not have her technical foul from Monday night's game rescinded.

text: Mamdani emerges as kingmaker, and other takeaways from Tuesday’s primaries - The Washington Post
fullText: Democratic socialist candidates won key races in New York, while more establishment candidates prevailed in other contests.

text: Scientists May Have Detected The First Signature of a Black Hole's Event Horizon - ScienceAlert
fullText: Everyone knows that no information can escape a black hole.
